title: Processed data for Improved circulating tumor DNA profiling by simultaneous extraction of DNA methylation and copy number information from MeD-seq
author: Hazelaar, Daan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains all processed data used in the manuscript titled  “Improved circulating tumor DNA profiling by simultaneous extraction of DNA methylation and copy number information from Methylated DNA Sequencing data (MeD-seq)” . 
 It includes: 
 
 
 Copy number profiles inferred from MeD-seq background reads 
 
 
 Methylated read count matrices across CpG islands 
 
 
 Differentially methylated region (DMR) profiles 
 
 
 Tumor fraction (TF) estimates 
 
 
 Reference files required for analysis 
 
 
 R objects used to generate all figures and results in the study 
 
 
 Raw sequencing data are not included due to privacy and size limitations.  
  Corresponding GitHub repository with all analysis code:   https://github.com/daanhazelaar/med-seq-ctDNA-profiling
